creator: ariff@FreeBSD.org
text:
>  This patch works for me.
>  

Just a final note. Since the interrupt pending message register is
local to each cpu / core, I had to move the fixup deep into
lapic_setup() routine though it works with just single cpu / core
fixup. Better safe than sorry.

  http://people.freebsd.org/~ariff/test/k8_c1e.diff


--
Ariff Abdullah
FreeBSD
